text.title: spec-examples-basic Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for spec-examples-basic as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: AC items that read as requirements: "User can register with email and password."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Not a scenario — has no Given, When, Then. Cannot be verified as pass or fail. Rewrite as a Given-When-Then scenario.

failure-mode.description: Agents adding "Technical Notes" or "Architecture" sections to a condensed spec.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: These belong in design.md. The spec answers WHAT and WHY only. Reject these sections at review.

failure-mode.description: Omitting the Out of Scope section entirely.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without explicit scope boundaries, any omitted feature becomes an implicit requirement. Out of Scope prevents implementation debates.
